title: FWA-Referenced Spatial Hydrology
text: FWA-Referenced Spatial Hydrology Stream network-aware spatial operations via direct SQL fwapg bcfishpass. Snap points streams, delineate watersheds, query fish observations, fetch network-referenced features BC Freshwater Atlas.

title: FWA-Referenced Spatial Hydrology
text: fresh requires PostgreSQL following extensions loaded: fwapg — BC Freshwater Atlas PostgreSQL bcfishpass — fish passage habitat modelling bcfishobs — fish observation data Connect via SSH tunnel remote instance run locally. See db-newgraph skill connection patterns.

title: FWA-Referenced Spatial Hydrology
text: fresh data layer family packages: fresh — fetch query FWA network data (package) flooded — floodplain delineation DEM stream network drift — land cover change detection within floodplains fly — interactive mapping layer toggle diggs — Shiny app front-end Pipeline: fresh (network data) → flooded (delineate) → drift (classify) → fly (map) → diggs (Shiny UI)
